operation: Begin on the XY workplane, sketch a 6-sided regular polygon with a 25 mm circumscribed diameter, extrude this sketch 8 mm upward to form the base. Next, select the topmost Z face of the base, create a new workplane on this face, sketch a 12 mm radius circle, extrude the circle 4 mm upward to form the upper cylindrical feature. Then select the positive X facing face, create a workplane on it, offset the sketch origin 6 mm downward along the Y axis, draw a 20 mm long, 5 mm wide horizontal 0-degree slot, and cut this slot completely through the entire part.
geometry: The part has a lower regular hexagonal prism base, with a coaxial, smaller diameter cylindrical boss protruding from the top of the hex base. A straight horizontal through-slot runs across the full depth of the part, positioned slightly below the vertical center of the positive X side face, passing entirely through both the upper cylinder and the lower hexagonal base.
function: This is a slotted mechanical fitting designed to be torqued or positioned via its hexagonal base, with the through-slot supporting tool engagement for actuation or alignment, and the upper cylindrical feature providing a round interface to mate with complementary circular components.
